title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of Baroda - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of Baroda - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of Baroda! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of Baroda:
Bank of Baroda is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda!
